author: Kevin Lacointe
subject: fix(currentRefinements): make removing a toggle refinement work
body:
When a toggle is checked, it appears correctly inside the `<CurrentRefinements/>` widget. 
However removing a toggle from the `<CurrentRefinements/>` widget wasn't working. 

Before this commit, `checked` was sent internally by connectToggle instead of `currentRefinement`. This led to inconsistencies when refining the widget or usage along with CurrentRefinement.
